content:
At TechLekh, we are committed to providing our readers with high-quality technology news and analysis. We value your feedback, comments, and suggestions, and we encourage you to get in touch with us if you have any questions or concerns. To contact us, please use one of the following methods: Email You can email us at contact@techlekh.com for any queries or concerns. We strive to respond to all emails within 24-48 hours. Social Media You can also reach out to us on our social media channels including Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn. We are active on these platforms and always ready to engage with our readers.

At TechLekh, we are committed to providing our readers with high-quality technology news and analysis. We value your feedback, comments, and suggestions, and we encourage you to get in touch with us if you have any questions or concerns.

To contact us, please use one of the following methods:

You can email us at contact@techlekh.com for any queries or concerns. We strive to respond to all emails within 24-48 hours.

You can also reach out to us on our social media channels including Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn. We are active on these platforms and always ready to engage with our readers.

TechLekh is located at the following address:

TechLekh Services Pvt. Ltd. Sukedhara, Kathmandu, Nepal +977-9813953967

meta.og:title: Contact Us
meta.og:description: Contact TechLekh, Nepal's leading tech media company, via email, and social media. We value your feedback and engagement with our readers.
